userExample.title: Masterpieces from Our Community

HomePage.testimonials-slogan: Join 50,000+ creators pushing the boundaries of AI art.

what.title: Why Choose AIO?
what.description: We've integrated the world's most powerful AI models into one seamless, production-ready workflow.
what.itemDescription1: Industry-leading image-to-video animation. Precise motion control with cinematic physics in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1.
what.itemDescription2: The gold standard for text-to-image. Generate hyper-realistic 1024×1024 visuals with incredible prompt adherence.
what.itemDescription3: Upload, prompt, and render. Get studio-quality outputs in minutes, not hours.
what.itemDescription4: All generated content is high-resolution and ready for commercial use in film, ads, or social media.

how.title: Three Steps to Studio Quality
how.item1: Upload your source image (JPG/PNG/WebP) to set the visual DNA.
how.item2: Describe the cinematic motion: camera sweeps, action, and lighting mood.
how.item3: Select your format and hit Generate. Your masterpiece will be ready in minutes.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Creators
testimonials.description: Real feedback from filmmakers, designers, and digital artists.

FAQ.title: Technical FAQ
FAQ.A1: Yes, for maximum control and consistency, our video engine animates directly from your uploaded 'starting frame'.
FAQ.Q2: Can I customize the output format?
FAQ.A2: Absolutely. You can toggle between Cinematic Landscape (16:9), Social Portrait (9:16), and Square (1:1).
FAQ.A3: Kling 2.1 generates High-Bitrate HD video optimized for professional screens.
FAQ.A4: Everything is securely saved in your private 'My Workspace'. You can download them anytime.
FAQ.Q5: What do I get as a starter?
FAQ.A5: New accounts get 20 credits—perfect for testing your first cinematic video or 10 HD images.
FAQ.A6: We offer support for all billing inquiries at support@ai-videogenerator.app. Subscriptions can be managed anytime.

Pricing.title: Professional Plans

seo.title: AIO Pricing – Flexible Plans for Every Budget
seo.description: Simple pricing. Choose between Monthly flexibility or Annual value. Get up to 9,000 credits.

FAQ.title: Billing & Subscription
FAQ.A1: Yes, you can cancel at any time from your dashboard or by emailing support. You'll retain access until the end of the period.
FAQ.Q2: What is the benefit of the Annual Plan?
FAQ.A2: The Annual Elite plan is our best value, offering 9,000 credits upfront and the lowest per-generation cost.
FAQ.Q3: Which plan is right for me?
FAQ.A3: If you're a heavy creator, the Annual Elite offers the most 'bang for your buck' at roughly $0.02 per credit.
FAQ.A4: Yes! One-time credit packs are available if you run out mid-month.
FAQ.Q5: Is there a limit on downloads?
FAQ.A5: No limits. Once you generate it, it's yours to keep and download as many times as you like.
FAQ.A6: We use Creem for bank-level payment security and encryption.
